Business: Mike's Pastry
Instagram Handle: @mikespastry
Report Type: Margin Surgery
Key Finding / Summary: Cannoli priced at $4.50 with 35% food cost — repricing to $5.50 could recover $2,400/mo in lost margin across 1,200 daily units.
Hephae Website: https://hephae.co

## REPORT LINKS (MUST include at least one in your output)
- Margin Surgery: https://cdn.hephae.co/reports/mikes-pastry-margin-2026.pdf

Business: Strand Bookstore
Instagram Handle: @strandbookstore
Facebook Page: StrandBookstoreNYC
Twitter/X Handle: @strandbooks
Report Type: SEO Audit
Key Finding / Summary: SEO score 71/100 — strong domain authority (DA 52) but missing structured data and slow mobile load at 3.8 seconds. Keywords for 'NYC bookstore' ranking page 2 could move to page 1 with technical fixes.
Hephae Website: https://hephae.co

## REPORT LINKS (MUST include at least one in your output)
- SEO Audit: https://cdn.hephae.co/reports/strand-seo-2026.pdf

Business: The Bosphorus
Report Type: Foot Traffic Forecast
Key Finding / Summary: Peak hours 12-2pm and 6-9pm with Wednesday-Thursday underperforming by 40% vs weekend. Targeted lunch specials on slow days could capture 25-30 additional covers/week.
Hephae Website: https://hephae.co

## REPORT LINKS (MUST include at least one in your output)
- Foot Traffic Forecast: https://cdn.hephae.co/reports/bosphorus-traffic-2026.pdf
